title: Privacy Policy
intro: This privacy policy describes how the {strong} app collects, uses, and protects its users' personal data.

section1.title: 1. Data Collected
section1.li4: Library data: books, reviews, reading statuses
section1.p2: We also use cookies to manage your session and keep you securely logged in.

section2.title: 2. Purpose of Processing
section2.p1: Collected data is used solely to:
section2.li1: Create and manage your user account
section2.li2: Save and consult your personal library

section3.title: 3. Third-party Services
section3.p1: We use the OpenLibrary API to enrich book information. None of your personal data is shared with this service.

section4.title: 4. Security
section4.p1: The security of your data is our priority. We implement technical measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access.

section5.title: 5. Data Retention
section5.p1: Your data is kept as long as your account is active. It is deleted immediately after account closure.

section6.title: 6. Your Rights (GDPR)
section6.p1: Under GDPR, you have the right to access, rectify, delete, and port your data. You may also limit or object to its processing.
section6.p2: To exercise your rights, contact us at:
